# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - frontend
    - frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - name: "frontend-primary-route"
      match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
          headers:
            x-api-version:
              exact: v2
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-4xx,reset,resource-exhausted
    - name: "frontend-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 90
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 80
          weight: 10
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
      corsPolicy:
        allowOrigins:
          - regex: ".*"
        allowMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - PATCH
          - OPTIONS
        allowHeaders:
          - authorization
          - content-type
          - x-request-id
          - x-api-version
        exposeHeaders:
          - x-request-id
        maxAge: "24h"
        allowCredentials: true

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 3600s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
        failover:
          - from: us-west
            to: us-east
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
      splitExternalLocalOriginErrors: true
      consecutiveLocalOriginFailures: 5
      consecutiveGatewayErrors: 5
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
            http2MaxRequests: 512
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
            http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
            http2MaxRequests: 512

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: backend-api-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - backend-api
    - backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "backend-api-canary-route"
      match:
        - headers:
            x-canary:
              exact: "true"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
    - name: "backend-api-default-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 80
        - destination:
            host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 20
      timeout: 60s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 20s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
      fault:
        delay:
          percentage:
            value: 0
          fixedDelay: 0s

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-api-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: backend-api.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 2000
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 2048
        http2MaxRequests: 2048
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 200
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 3600s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 40
      minHealthPercent: 30
      splitExternalLocalOriginErrors: true
      consecutiveLocalOriginFailures: 3
      consecutiveGatewayErrors: 3
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
      trafficPolicy:
        loadBalancer:
          simple: LEAST_REQUEST
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2
      trafficPolicy:
        loadBalancer:
          simple: LEAST_REQUEST

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: order-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - order-service
    - order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "order-service-primary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 45s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 15s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: order-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1500
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 150
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 1800s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: payment-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - payment-service
    - payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "payment-service-primary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8443
          weight: 100
      timeout: 120s
      retries:
        attempts: 1
        perTryTimeout: 60s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 500
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
        http2MaxRequests: 512
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 1
        idleTimeout: 1800s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 2
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - inventory-service
    - inventory-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "inventory-service-primary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: inventory-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1

metadata:
  name: inventory-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: inventory-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1000
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 1800s

    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s

      labels:

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: notification-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - notification-service
    - notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "notification-service-primary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 5
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-4xx

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: notification-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: notification-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 800
        connectTimeout: 15s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 512
        http2MaxRequests: 512
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 5
        idleTimeout: 1800s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 15s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: user-service-virtualservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  hosts:
    - user-service
    - user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - name: "user-service-primary-route"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8080
          weight: 100
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: user-service-destinationrule
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 1500
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1024
        http2MaxRequests: 1024
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 1800s
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 30
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        httpsRedirect: false
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: https
        protocol: HTTPS
      hosts:
        - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
        - "*.example.com"
      tls:
        mode: SIMPLE
        credentialName: istio-ingressgateway-certs

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: mesh-wide-mtls-destinationrule
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    mesh: istio
    environment: development
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
